LanguageData.Ammo_10mmRailgun_SabotOE.label: 10mm Railgun cartridge (Sabot:OE)
LanguageData.Ammo_10mmRailgun_SabotOE.description: Fin-stabilized tungsten carbide penetrator with discarding sabot, designed for long-range railgun weapons.
LanguageData.Bullet_10mmRailgun_SabotOE.label: 10mm Railgun bullet (Sabot:OE)
